prompts.prompt: Premium 2026 SaaS product hero illustration, cinematic dark mode, near-black background with a faint dot grid and soft volumetric light. Concept: an AI agent depicted as a glowing indigo orb offers a floating memory card to a luminous magnifying-glass gateway; clean emerald-green verified cards pass through while a single toxic-red cracked card is caught and stopped at the gate. Glassmorphism, indigo and violet with emerald accents and one controlled toxic-red, ultra-clean, high detail, balanced composition, no text, no watermark, smooth polished, not cluttered.
